description: A third-party music festival has provided a sales CSV file (/home/ga/Documents/data/festival_sales.csv) to be ingested into the Chinook database (chinook.db). Process this data by importing it into a staging table named 'festival_sales_import' and populating a destination table 'valid_festival_sales' with columns Id (PK), SaleDate, CustomerId, TrackId, and Price. Valid rows require an exact match between UserEmail and an existing Customer, as well as between SongTitle/ArtistName and an existing Track/Artist. Export all rejected rows that could not be mapped to /home/ga/Documents/exports/festival_sales_exceptions.csv.
